tasks.label: runtime: run (lmstudio)
tasks.command: if lsof -nP -iTCP:8080 -sTCP:LISTEN -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'agent runtime listening on :8080 (already running)'; else AGENT_ALLOW_COMMANDS=true AGENT_PROVIDER=lmstudio LMSTUDIO_MODEL=qwen/qwen2.5-coder-14b go run ./cmd/agentd; fi

tasks.label: runtime: run (ollama)
tasks.command: if lsof -nP -iTCP:8080 -sTCP:LISTEN -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'agent runtime listening on :8080 (already running)'; else AGENT_ALLOW_COMMANDS=true AGENT_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=llama3.2:3b go run ./cmd/agentd; fi
